title: affaan-m/ECC
content: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.

title: ultraworkers/claw-code

title: n8n-io/n8n

title: Helping build shared standards for advanced AI

title: How GPT-5 helped immunologist Derya Unutmaz solve a 3-year-old mystery
content: GPT-5 Pro helped solve a 3-year-old immunology mystery, offering insights into T cell behavior. The breakthrough could support cancer and autoimmune research.
summary: GPT-5 Pro 帮助免疫学家 Derya Unutmaz 解决了一个持续三年的免疫学谜团，揭示了T细胞行为的新见解，这一突破可能支持癌症和自身免疫研究。
highlights: GPT-5 Pro helped solve a 3-year-old immunology mystery
offering insights into T cell behavior
The breakthrough could support cancer and autoimmune research

title: Build real agentic apps using CUGA: two dozen working examples on a lightweight harness
summary: 本文介绍了CUGA（一种轻量级框架）及其在构建真实代理应用中的实用性，提供了二十多个工作示例，展示了如何利用该框架实现高效、灵活的代理系统。
highlights: Build real agentic apps using CUGA
two dozen working examples on a lightweight harness
展示了CUGA在构建真实代理应用中的实用性

title: Shipping huggingface_hub every week with AI, open tools, and a human in the loop
summary: 本文介绍了Hugging Face团队如何通过每周发布huggingface_hub库，结合AI、开源工具和人工审核，实现高效、可靠的持续集成与交付流程。
highlights: Shipping huggingface_hub every week with AI, open tools, and a human in the loop
结合AI、开源工具和人工审核的每周发布流程
